title: Target Hunt
description: A small and fun short mini-game you can play with your friends! no player limit.
body:
This is a game that someone random will be chosen as the **Target** and the other players will be **Hunters**.
Hunters try to kill the target, the hunter who kills the target becomes the target himself.

the target has better fighting gear but hunters are faster and have faster tools so that the target can't run away easily.
The hunters have a tracker compass, however the target has glowing.

### Information about the game:
Game Version: 1.21.5 - 1.21.10
Player Amount: 4 Players recommended. but the cap is infinite.
Game Duration: 30 Minutes

## Information about the points system:
### Target Points System
- Every second surviving --> **+1 Point**
- Killing a hunter --> **+3 Points**
- Last one to be the target --> **+100 Points**
- Dying by natural causes --> **-100 Points**
### Hunter Points System
- Killing the target --> **+30 Points**
- Killing a teammate --> **-15 Points**

## The game commands:
- /trigger start --> Starts the game
- /trigger stop --> Stops the game
- /trigger restart --> Restarts the game (stops the game then starts it again)
- /trigger settings Coming soon!
